name: Building Services (MEP)
student_summary: Design a building's lungs and nerves — HVAC, electrical, plumbing, fire.
overview: Design a building's lungs and nerves — HVAC, electrical, plumbing, fire. Building Services (MEP) sits in the Construction Delivery family of Construction, Architecture & Urban Development. It is a broad career direction — you can enter it through several routes and specialize later without restarting.
who_is_this_for: You notice the small things others miss
who_should_avoid: You strongly prefer solitary desk work over this field's day-to-day reality
daily_responsibilities: Apply hvac design to real problems
Collaborate with your team using electrical layouts
Keep improving at plumbing & fire systems — the field keeps moving
Communicate progress, results and decisions to the people who depend on them
work_environment: Primarily on-site — offices, facilities or the field depending on the role
problem_solving_style: Practical — diagnose, build, fix and improve on the ground
scope: Demand outlook in India is booming; see FAQs for how the platform keeps this current.
ai_impact: low — AI assists rather than replaces
advantages: Demand is booming: opportunities across India and beyond
A broad Construction Delivery foundation that opens multiple specializations later
challenges: Early years demand patience before the rewards compound
misconceptions: “You must pick your exact job title now.” Building Services (MEP) is a direction — specialization comes later.
“Only toppers make it.” Consistent skill-building beats one exam rank in the long run.
portfolio_ideas: A documented case study of electrical layouts
projects: Beginner: explore hvac design with a small self-chosen project
Intermediate: build or run something real using Revit MEP
books: 101 Things I Learned in Architecture School
The Death and Life of Great American Cities
smaller_city_scope: Viable in smaller cities — demand exists well beyond the metros.
rural_scope: Limited rural presence; expect to base yourself in a town or city.
home_state_note: Ask the AI coach about your state — regional demand, cities and relocation advice are generated live from retrieved data, never hardcoded.
transition_paths: Toward Electrical & Electronics Engineering: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
Toward Mechanical Engineering: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
Toward Green Building & Sustainable Design: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
faqs: What does Building Services (MEP) pay in India?
Entry roles typically start around ₹5 LPA and senior professionals reach ₹15 LPA or more. Live, region-specific salary data is retrieved by the platform when you ask.
What should I study after Class 12?
Focus on Physics, Mathematics. Typical degrees: B.Tech Mechanical/Electrical + MEP specialization. Alternatives exist: diploma + site experience ladder.
Will AI take over this career?
AI impact is low — AI assists rather than replaces. Broad paths like Building Services (MEP) evolve rather than disappear — the students who pair domain skill with AI tools benefit most.
Is this a broad path or a specific job?
Building Services (MEP) is a career direction. Once inside it you can specialize further — the platform will map specializations in future versions.
